card.title: vFit® Gold+ Device
card.description: Developed by OB-GYNs and endorsed by hundreds of doctors, the vFit Gold® Device is a patented, at-home solution that uses red-light technology to support pelvic floor strength, hydration, and intimate wellness. With regular use, it may help promote comfort, sensation, and confidence, all from the privacy of your home.
card.finePrint: No membership required. We bill & ship quarterly and you can cancel your subscription at any time. Due to state regulations we cannot ship test...

benefits.title: Enhance Vaginal Health
benefits.description: Boosts blood flow and collagen production for stronger pelvic floor muscles and lubrication.

benefits.title: Support Intimate Comfort
benefits.description: Provides a non-invasive solution to help with dryness, discomfort, and reduced sensitivity.

benefits.title: Improve Sexual Health
benefits.description: Enhances sensitivity and rejuvenating intimate areas through targeted light therapy.

splitContent.title: Improve your pelvic floor strength and sexual function with vFit.
features: Improves hydration and sexual function for women

quotes.quote: “I have absolutely enjoyed using Conquers services. The process was so easy and convenient with my busy schedule. And now I feel like a rockstar after dialing in all my markers. I recommend them to everyone!”
quotes.author: Janna Breslin

faqs.title: Have Questions? We're Here to Help

items.question: What is the vFit Gold® Device?
items.answer: You can expect personalized treatment plans, licensed medical support, and continuous follow-up designed around your goals.

items.question: How does vFit Gold® work?
items.answer: Coverage depends on your plan and location. We provide transparent pricing and documentation you can use for reimbursement when eligible.

items.question: How often should I use vFit Gold®?
items.answer: Yes, many of our services can be paid using HSA/FSA cards. Eligibility may vary by provider and treatment type.

items.question: Who can benefit from using vFit Gold®?
items.answer: At the moment, services and fulfillment are focused on approved U.S. regions where our providers are licensed.

items.question: How long does it take to notice results?
items.answer: Your care team includes qualified clinicians and support staff who guide you through onboarding, treatment, and progress tracking.

items.question: Does vFit Gold® require a prescription?
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.

items.question: Can vFit Gold® be used with lubricants?
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.
